name: Ongoing Intake Reuse Live Test Cycle
description: Test-owned ongoing workflow used to prove same-workflow reuse across multiple waves of root work items.
outcome: Incoming work items are processed on a reusable ongoing workflow that returns to pending when idle.

definition.process_instructions: This is an ongoing intake workflow. Each newly created root work item represents an independent intake request on the same reusable workflow. Route each open work item to the live-test intake analyst, wait for that specialist to finish, and then mark the work item done when its acceptance criteria are satisfied. Do not complete the workflow after a single item; when there is no more open work, leave the workflow in its ongoing pending state so future root work items can reactivate it.

parameters.name: goal
parameters.description: What this ongoing intake workflow should accomplish

columns.label: Planned
columns.description: Work is queued and waiting for analysis.

columns.label: In Progress
columns.description: A specialist is actively working the intake item.

columns.label: Blocked
columns.description: Work is blocked and needs intervention.

columns.label: Done
columns.description: The intake item has been triaged and closed.

stages.name: triage
stages.goal: Each intake request is analyzed and closed.

checkpoints.name: triage
checkpoints.goal: The intake request has a completed triage handoff and is ready to close.
checkpoints.entry_criteria: A root work item exists for the intake request.
